SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Immediately begin playing playlist on open

DropDownPreference.android:title: Font Size
DropDownPreference.android:summary: Adjust the size of the text

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Show Genre / Playlist
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Show the selected genre and playlist in the title bar

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Player Background Color
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Have the background color of the music player match the album artwork

Preference.android:title: Log Out
Preference.android:summary: Log out of the current account
